release_notes:
- v1.26.2 includes security fixes for permissions, artifact signatures, token scope checks, OAuth/PKCE handling, downloads, wiki writes, and LFS token access.
- It also fixes package permission checks, smart HTTP request scopes, basic auth, maintainer edit permissions, URL sanitization, and attachment Content-Security-Policy.
- Dependency security updates are included, such as mermaid v11.15.0 and go-git updates.
